title: Feed sweep, 3 feed(s) (2026-07-21)
text:
Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-21 Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/gritt-exits-stealth-with-34-million-for-robots-to-build-solar-plants-then-everything-else/ Music campaign to slow China's AI advances. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/us-threatens-sanctions-against-chinese-ai-models-over-ip-theft/ Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro AI News https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/data-centers-expected-to-use-4x-more-electricity-by-2035/ AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-21 Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/ai-and-the-rise-of-the-universal-entertainment-app/ Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-21 Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/jack-dorsey-is-taking-on-slack-with-buzz-a-group-chat-platform-for-teams-and-their-ai-agents/ OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models AI News & Artificial Intelligence | TechCrunch 2026-07-21 OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry. https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/21/openai-says-hugging-face-was-breached-by-its-own-pre-release-models/ SEO tools for SaaS: 13 best options to scale your content ops Marketing 2026-07-21

B2B SaaS businesses achieve an average ROI of 702% from SEO, yet most teams are still using a SaaS SEO tool stack built https://blog.hubspot.com/marketing/saas-seo-tools China’s AI talent race is starting in high school Rest of World - 2026-07-21 As demand for elite AI engineers outpaces supply, companies are recruiting teenagers through camps, research programs, and guaranteed job pipelines. https://restofworld.org/2026/china-tech-recruiting-teenagers-ai-shortage/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=feeds
